messages.content: I want you to act as an Chinese translator, spelling corrector and improver. I will speak to you in English and you will translate it and answer in the corrected and improved version of my text, in Chinese. I want you to replace my simplified A0-level words and sentences with more beautiful and elegant, upper level Chinese qnq ‘aues bu,ueaw aui daay'saouauas pue spuoM make them more literary.I want you to only reply the correction, the improvements and nothing else, do not write explanations.
Of course, I will do my best to help with your request. Please go ahead and provide me with the text you would like me to translate and improve in Chinese.

1. Introduction
Project-based learning has been designated as a key educational innovation in the recent education reform in Hong Kong (Education Commission, 2000). Like the large-scale education reforms that have been launched since the 1990s in many western countries (Fullan, 2000; Kim, 2004), the recent Hong Kong education reform has been propelled by a strong demand from society that students should learn how to meet the challenges of a knowledge-based and fast-changing society. Schools are required to promote not only students’ subject-matter knowledge but also general skills, such as critical thinking or collaborative skills.
基於近年來香港教育改革的重要性及教育機構進行的大量教育改革，該項目已被指定為重要的教育創新，並獲得了教育委員會的支持（2000）。與自1990年代以來許多西方國家推出的大規模教育改革一樣，最近的香港教育改革也受到了社會的強烈需求，即學生應該學會應對知識型和快速變化的社會挑戰。學校不僅需要促進學生的學科知識，還需要提倡學生發展一般技能，如批判性思維或協作能力。
用简体中文
基于近年来香港教育改革的重要性及教育机构进行的大量教育改革，该项目已被指定为重要的教育创新，并获得了教育委员会的支持（2000）。与自1990年代以来许多西方国家推出的大规模教育改革一样，最近的香港教育改革也受到了社会的强烈需求，即学生应该学会应对知识型和快速变化的社会挑战。学校不仅需要促进学生的学科知识，还需要提倡学生发展一般技能，如批判性思维或协作能力。

To equip students with skills in critical thinking, collaboration, communication, and problem solving, teachers are encouraged to use more student-centered teaching approaches. Project-based learning is one of the student-centered approaches which are highly recommended by the Hong Kong education reform. According to the Hong Kong curriculum reform proposal, project-based learning is described as a teaching strategy that would «enable students to connect knowledge, skills, values, and attitudes and to construct knowledge through a variety of learning experiences» (Curriculum Development Council, 2001, p. 87).
为了配备学生批判性思维、协作、沟通和问题解决等技能，教师被鼓励采用更多以学生为中心的教学方法。项目学习是香港教育改革高度推荐的学生中心方法之一。根据香港课程改革提案，项目学习被描述为一种教学策略，将«使学生能够通过各种学习经验连接知识、技能、价值观和态度，并构建知识»（课程发展委员会，2001年，第87页）。

The aim of the present study was to investigate the factors that contribute to teacher motivation in the implementation of project-based learning. Previous research has suggested a number of factors that may influence the degree to which teachers will persist in an educational innovation. These factors can be classified into two broad categories: (a) teacher personal factors and (b) school contextual factors. Teacher personal factors include congruence between the innovation and the teacher’s philosophy of education (Briscoe, 1991; Rich, 1990), teacher’s self-efficacy (Ohlhausen, Meyerson, & Sexton, 1992; Ross, 1994), and teacher’s perceived value of the innovation and expectancy of success (Abrami, Poulsen, & Chambers, 2004).

本研究旨在探讨影响教师在项目学习实施中的动机的因素。先前的研究已提出一些可能影响教师坚持进行教育创新的因素。这些因素可分为两大类：（a）教师个人因素和（b）学校背景因素。教师个人因素包括创新与教师教育理念的一致性（布里斯科，1991年；里奇，1990年）、教师的自我效能（奧爾豪森，邁耶森，和塞克斯頓，1992年；羅斯，1994年）以及教师对创新的感知价值和成功的期望（阿布拉米，波尔森，和钱伯斯，2004年）。

School contextual factors include practical constraints, such as class size and time requirements (Sleeter, 1992), the management style of the principal (Zeichner, 1991), and the influence of school culture (Fullan & Hargreaves, 1997). We investigated whether schools, which are perceived by teachers as collegial and supportive of teachers’ competence and autonomy, tend to have teachers who are motivated in the implementation of project -based learning. We focused on school support because of the significant role of environment in influencing human behaviors (Lewin, 1936). We believe that school support, a contextual factor, is intricately related to teacher motivation, a personal factor.

学校背景因素包括实际限制，如班级规模和时间要求（斯利特，1992年）、校长的管理风格（齐希纳，1991年）以及学校文化的影响（富兰和哈格里夫斯，1997年）。我们调查了老师是否认为学校具有同事关系，并支持老师的能力和自主权，倾向于拥有在项目学习实施中积极性的教师。我们关注学校支持，因为环境在影响人类行为方面发挥着重要作用（列温，1936年）。我们相信，学校支持作为一个背景因素，与教师的动机作为一个个人因素密切相关。

1.1 Project-based learning 
Project-based learning is part of the instructional approach originating from Dewey (1938), who stressed the importance of practical experience in learning. In project-based learning, students work in small groups on academic tasks. The task can be in the form of investigation or research on a particular topic. The topic being studied usually integrates concepts from a number of disciplines or fields of study. Students in the same small group collaborate with one another to reach a collective outcome over a period of time. They pursue solutions to a problem by asking and refining questions, debating ideas, making predictions, collecting and analyzing data, drawing conclusions, and communicating their findings to others. This approach is widely believed to be a powerful teaching strategy that would enhance student motivation and promote self-directed learning (Blumenfeld et al., 1991)

1.1 项目学习
项目学习是源自杜威（1938年）的教学方法的一部分，他强调了学习中实践经验的重要性。在项目学习中，学生以小组形式开展学术任务。任务可以是对特定主题的调查或研究。被研究的主题通常整合了多个学科或研究领域的概念。同一小组的学生相互协作，通过一段时间达成集体成果。他们通过提出和完善问题、辩论观点、做出预测、收集和分析数据、得出结论，并将其发现与他人交流来追求解决问题。普遍认为，这种方法是一种有效的教学策略，可以提高学生的动机，并促进自主学习（Blumenfeld等，1991年）。

Although project-based learning is regarded highly as an effective educational innovation in this time of education reform, it is not readily accepted by all teachers in Hong Kong. Watkins and Biggs (2001) have poignantly commented that many innovations imported from the West to Hong Kong are like organ transplants that are rejected. Project-based learning, as a new teaching approach from the West, is expected to encounter skepticism and even resistance from local teachers whose cultural background is different from that of their western counterparts. A recent study (Tse, Lam, Lam, & Loh, 2005) has shown that, although student-centered approaches are officially recommended, most Hong Kong Chinese language teachers still employ teacher-led approaches in their teaching.

尽管在这个教育改革时代，项目学习被高度认为是一种有效的教育创新，但并不是所有香港老师都能轻易接受。Watkins和Biggs（2001）尖锐地评论称，从西方引入香港的许多创新就像器官移植一样遭到了拒绝。作为一种来自西方的新教学方法，项目学习被预期会遭遇对来自不同文化背景的香港教师产生怀疑甚至抵制。最近的一项研究（Tse，Lam，Lam和Loh，2005）表明，尽管以学生为中心的方法被官方推荐，但大多数香港中文教师仍然采用以教师为主导的教学方法。

Their reluctance is understandable. The new practices bear little resemblance to either their current practices or to the way they have learned and experienced teaching as students themselves. Indeed, the challenges of implementing project-based learning are not unique to Hong Kong but occur around the world where student-centered reform is advocated (Carrera, Tellez, & D’Ottavio, 2003; Saye & Brush, 2004).
他们的犹豫是可以理解的。新的做法与他们当前的做法或他们自己作为学生学习和经历教学的方式几乎毫无相似之处。事实上，实施项目学习所面临的挑战并不仅限于香港，而是在全球范围内发生，特别是在主张以学生为中心的教育改革的国家（卡雷拉，特莱斯和多塔维奥，2003年；赛伊和布拉什，2004年）。

1.2 School support and teacher motivation
While the benefits of project-based learning for students remain to be seen, few would argue that a key factor contributing to its successful implementation in the local setting hinges on teacher motivation. Project-based learning will have a better chance to bring about the desired benefits for students if teachers have a strong motivation to experiment with, and improve it in the classroom. Abrami et al. (2004) point out that an educational innovation often meets with a wide range of teacher receptivity. Some teachers may apply the innovation with great enthusiasm and persistence until it becomes fully integrated into their teaching.

1.2 学校支持与教师动机
尽管项目学习对学生的好处有待观察，但很少有人会否认，在本地情境中，促成其成功实施的关键因素之一取决于教师的动机。如果教师有强烈的动机去尝试和改进课堂上的项目学习，那么项目学习将更有可能为学生带来期望的好处。阿布拉米等人（2004年）指出，教育创新往往会受到教师接受程度的影响。一些教师可能会充满热情和毅力地应用这项创新，直到它完全融入他们的教学中。

However, some may never try the new teaching strategy or may return to their old teaching practice after only a few initial attempts. It is important to find out why teachers vary in their motivation in implementing educational innovations. The knowledge in this respect is useful for the educators who are eager to improve instructional methods by educational innovations. In the present study, we investigated three dimensions of school support: (a) competence support, (b) autonomy support, and (c) collegial support. We focused on these three dimensions on the basis of self-determination theory (Ryan & Deci, 2000), an influential theory in the field of motivation. Ryan and Deci (2000), the leading proponents of self-determination theory, postulate that the needs for competence, autonomy, and relatedness are three fundamental and universal needs of people.

然而，一些教师可能永远不会尝试新的教学策略，或者在初次尝试后就回到他们的旧教学做法。重要的是找出教师在实施教育创新时动机不同的原因。对于那些渴望通过教育创新来改进教学方法的教育者来说，这方面的知识是有用的。在本研究中，我们调查了学校支持的三个维度：（a）能力支持，（b）自主支持和（c）同事支持。我们基于自我决定理论（Ryan和Deci，2000），一个在动机领域具有影响力的理论，专注于这三个维度。Ryan和Deci（2000年）是自我决定理论的主要倡导者，他们假设能力、自主和关系的需求是人类的三个基本和普遍需求。

According to Deci and Ryan (2000), the need for competence refers to the need to engage in optimal challenges and experience mastery in one’s endeavors; the need for autonomy refers to the need to experience oneself as the initiator of action and to self-regulate one’s own behaviors; and the need for relatedness refers to the need to seek attachments and experience feelings of security, belongingness, and intimacy with others. Deci and Ryan (2000) argue that satisfaction of these basic psychological needs provides the nutriments for motivation. Therefore, social environments can facilitate or forestall motivation by either supporting or thwarting people’s needs for competence, autonomy, and relatedness.

根据Deci和Ryan（2000年）的观点，对于能力的需求指的是在适当的挑战中参与，并在自己的努力中经验掌握；对于自主的需求指的是体验自己是行动的发起者，并自我调节自己的行为；而对于关系的需求则指的是寻求依附并经验到与他人的安全感、归属感和亲密感。Deci和Ryan（2000年）认为，满足这些基本心理需求为动机提供了营养。因此，社会环境可以通过支持或阻碍人们对能力、自主和关系的需求来促进或抑制动机。

The motivation that is facilitated or forestalled includes both extrinsic and intrinsic motivations. Extrinsic motivation refers to engaging in an activity as a means to an end that is outside the activity (e.g., getting praise or avoiding blame) whereas intrinsic motivation refers to performing an activity as an end in itself (i.e., for inherent pleasure). Despite the stark contrast between extrinsic and intrinsic motivations, Ryan and Deci (2000) do not conceptualize them as a dichotomy. Instead, they regard them as a continuum reflecting various degrees of self-determination. This continuum ranges from doing something out of heteronomy (i.e., external obligation) at one end to doing something out of autonomy (i.e., internal desires) at the other end.

促进或阻碍的动机包括外在动机和内在动机。外在动机指的是参与某项活动是为了达到活动之外的目的（例如，得到表扬或避免责备），而内在动机则指的是将活动视为自身目标（即，出于内在的乐趣）。尽管外在动机和内在动机之间存在鲜明对比，但Ryan和Deci（2000年）并不将它们看作是二元对立关系。相反，他们认为它们是反映自主程度不同程度的一个连续体。这一连续体从一端的异命性（即，外部义务）做某事，到另一端的自主性（即，内在欲望）做某事。

However, extrinsic motivation does not necessarily entail heteronomy. If people can internalize the external obligation, their extrinsically motivated behaviors can be autonomous. Self-determination theory postulates that people will experience more self-determination if their regulat ion involves a higher degree of internalization. External, introjected, and identified regulations are forms of extrinsic motivation but they vary in the degree of self-determination. External regulation involves the least internalization, with behaviors controlled by external forces. Introjected regulation involves a partial internalization, with behaviors performed to protect self-esteem or to avoid anxiety. Identified regulation involves a higher degree of self-determination because people tend to recognize and accept the value of a personally important behavior.

然而，外在动机并不一定就意味着异命性。如果人们能够内化外部的义务，他们的外在动机行为可以是自主的。自我决定理论假设，如果人们的调节涉及更高程度的内化，他们将体验到更多的自主性。外部、内在化和识别化调节是外在动机的形式，但它们在自主性程度上有所不同。外部调节涉及的内化最少，行为受外部力量控制。内在化调节涉及部分内化，行为是为了维护自尊或避免焦虑。识别化调节涉及更高程度的自主性，因为人们倾向于认识并接受对个人重要行为的价值。

However, identified regulation still has a lower degree of self-determination than intrinsic motivation which refers to having inherent enjoyment in performing the behaviors. According to self-determination theory, social environments that support people’s innate needs for competence, autonomy, and relatedness will promote the development of intrinsic motivation as well as the internalization of extrinsic motivation (Ryan & Deci, 2000).
然而，识别化调节仍然比内在动机具有较低的自主性程度，内在动机指的是在执行行为时具有内在乐趣。根据自我决定理论，支持人们对能力、自主性和关系的内在需求的社会环境将促进内在动机的发展以及外在动机的内化（Ryan和Deci，2000年）。
